steps.title: Set up the ratio relationship
steps.content:
The ratio of base to height is 1 to 8. This means $\frac{\text{base}}{\text{height}} = \frac{1}{8}$, or equivalently:
$$\text{height} = 8 \times \text{base}$$

steps.title: Calculate the height
steps.content:
Substitute base = 104 cm:
$$\text{height} = 8 \times 104 = 832 \text{ cm}$$
That matches choice D — D is correct.
